title: United States Declaration of Independence
description: The Thirteen Colonies declared independence from Great Britain, forming the United States of America.

title: French Revolution Begins
description: The storming of the Bastille marked the beginning of the French Revolution and the fall of the monarchy.

title: Haitian Independence
description: Haiti became the first independent nation in Latin America and the Caribbean, and the first post-colonial Black-led nation.

title: Mexican War of Independence Begins
description: The Grito de Dolores marked the beginning of Mexico's independence movement from Spain.

title: Argentine Independence
description: Argentina declared independence from Spain at the Congress of Tucuman.

title: Chilean Independence
description: Chile formally declared independence from Spain after years of struggle.

title: Central American Independence
description: Guatemala and the Central American provinces declared independence from Spain.

title: Brazilian Independence
description: Brazil declared independence from Portugal, with Pedro I becoming Emperor.

title: Bolivian Independence
description: Bolivia declared independence from Spain, named after liberator Simon Bolivar.

title: Uruguayan Independence
description: Uruguay gained independence following the Treaty of Montevideo.

title: Belgian Revolution
description: Belgium declared independence from the Kingdom of the Netherlands.

title: Ecuadorian Independence
description: Ecuador separated from Gran Colombia and became a sovereign state.

title: Texas Independence
description: The Republic of Texas declared independence from Mexico, later joining the United States.

title: Liberian Independence
description: Liberia declared independence, becoming the first independent republic in Africa.

title: Unification of Italy
description: The Kingdom of Italy was proclaimed, unifying the Italian peninsula under one government.

title: Canadian Confederation
description: The British North America Act united three colonies into the Dominion of Canada.

title: German Unification
description: The German Empire was proclaimed at Versailles, unifying German states under Prussian leadership.

title: Philippine Independence
description: The Philippines declared independence from Spain during the Philippine Revolution.

title: Federation of Australia
description: Six British colonies federated to form the Commonwealth of Australia.

title: Norwegian Independence
description: Norway dissolved its union with Sweden and became a fully independent nation.

title: New Zealand Dominion
description: New Zealand became a dominion within the British Empire.

title: Portuguese Republic
description: The Portuguese monarchy was overthrown and the First Portuguese Republic was established.

title: Finnish Independence
description: Finland declared independence from the Russian Empire during the Russian Revolution.

title: Estonian Independence
description: Estonia declared independence from the Russian Empire.

title: Lithuanian Independence
description: Lithuania declared independence, restoring the Lithuanian state.

title: Latvian Independence
description: Latvia declared independence from Russian and German rule.

title: Czechoslovakia Founded
description: Czechoslovakia was established as an independent state from the Austro-Hungarian Empire.

title: Polish Independence Restored
description: Poland regained independence after 123 years of partition among Russia, Prussia, and Austria.

title: Afghan Independence
description: Afghanistan gained full independence from British influence after the Third Anglo-Afghan War.

title: Irish Independence
description: The Irish Free State was established, gaining independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Egyptian Independence
description: Egypt gained independence from the United Kingdom, ending the British protectorate.

title: Republic of Turkey Founded
description: Mustafa Kemal Ataturk proclaimed the Republic of Turkey from the remnants of the Ottoman Empire.

title: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia Founded
description: The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia was officially founded by Abdulaziz ibn Saud.

title: Lebanese Independence
description: Lebanon gained independence from the French Mandate.

title: Icelandic Independence
description: Iceland declared full independence from Denmark and established a republic.

title: Indonesian Independence
description: Indonesia declared independence from the Netherlands following Japanese occupation.

title: Vietnamese Independence
description: Ho Chi Minh declared Vietnamese independence from France.

title: Jordanian Independence
description: Jordan gained independence from the British Mandate.

title: Philippine Republic
description: The Philippines gained full independence from the United States.

title: Indian Independence
description: India gained independence from the British Empire, ending nearly 200 years of colonial rule.

title: Pakistani Independence
description: Pakistan was created as an independent nation during the partition of British India.

title: Burmese Independence
description: Burma gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Sri Lankan Independence
description: Ceylon gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: State of Israel Established
description: Israel declared independence, establishing the first Jewish state in nearly 2000 years.

title: North Korea Founded
description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea was proclaimed in the Soviet-occupied zone.

title: South Korea Founded
description: The Republic of Korea was established in the American-occupied zone.

title: People's Republic of China Founded
description: Mao Zedong proclaimed the People's Republic of China in Beijing.

title: Libyan Independence
description: Libya gained independence from Italy, becoming the United Kingdom of Libya.

title: Sudanese Independence
description: Sudan gained independence from joint British-Egyptian rule.

title: Moroccan Independence
description: Morocco gained independence from France and Spain.

title: Tunisian Independence
description: Tunisia gained independence from France.

title: Ghanaian Independence
description: Ghana became the first sub-Saharan African country to gain independence from colonial rule.

title: Malaysian Independence
description: Malaya gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Guinean Independence
description: Guinea declared independence from France, the first French African colony to do so.

title: Cameroonian Independence
description: Cameroon gained independence from France.

title: Congolese Independence
description: The Democratic Republic of the Congo gained independence from Belgium.

title: Somali Independence
description: British and Italian Somaliland united to form the Somali Republic.

title: Beninese Independence
description: Dahomey gained independence from France, later renamed Benin.

title: Nigerien Independence
description: Niger gained independence from France.

title: Upper Volta Independence
description: Upper Volta gained independence from France, later renamed Burkina Faso.

title: Ivorian Independence
description: Ivory Coast gained independence from France.

title: Gabonese Independence
description: Gabon gained independence from France.

title: Nigerian Independence
description: Nigeria gained independence from the United Kingdom, becoming Africa's most populous nation.

title: Mauritanian Independence
description: Mauritania gained independence from France.

title: Sierra Leonean Independence
description: Sierra Leone gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Tanganyikan Independence
description: Tanganyika gained independence from the United Kingdom, later merging with Zanzibar to form Tanzania.

title: Rwandan Independence
description: Rwanda gained independence from Belgium.

title: Algerian Independence
description: Algeria gained independence from France after a brutal eight-year war.

title: Jamaican Independence
description: Jamaica gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Malaysia Formed
description: The Federation of Malaysia was formed, incorporating Malaya, Singapore, Sabah, and Sarawak.

title: Kenyan Independence
description: Kenya gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Malawian Independence
description: Malawi gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Zambian Independence
description: Zambia gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Singaporean Independence
description: Singapore separated from Malaysia and became an independent city-state.

title: Botswanan Independence
description: Botswana gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Mauritian Independence
description: Mauritius gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Bangladeshi Independence
description: Bangladesh declared independence from Pakistan, leading to the Bangladesh Liberation War.

title: United Arab Emirates Formed
description: Seven emirates united to form the United Arab Emirates.

title: Bahamian Independence
description: The Bahamas gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Mozambican Independence
description: Mozambique gained independence from Portugal after a decade-long war.

title: Cape Verdean Independence
description: Cape Verde gained independence from Portugal.

title: Angolan Independence
description: Angola gained independence from Portugal.

title: Surinamese Independence
description: Suriname gained independence from the Netherlands.

title: Seychellois Independence
description: Seychelles gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Djiboutian Independence
description: Djibouti gained independence from France.

title: Islamic Republic of Iran
description: The Iranian Revolution established the Islamic Republic, ending 2500 years of monarchy.

title: Zimbabwean Independence
description: Zimbabwe gained internationally recognized independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Bruneian Independence
description: Brunei gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Fall of the Berlin Wall
description: The Berlin Wall fell, paving the way for German reunification and the end of the Cold War.

title: Namibian Independence
description: Namibia gained independence from South African administration.

title: Yemeni Unification
description: North Yemen and South Yemen merged to form the Republic of Yemen.

title: German Reunification
description: East Germany and West Germany officially reunified into a single German state.

title: Georgian Independence
description: Georgia declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Georgia Restores Independence
description: Georgia officially restored its independence based on the 1918 declaration.

title: Slovenian Independence
description: Slovenia declared independence from Yugoslavia.

title: Croatian Independence
description: Croatia declared independence from Yugoslavia.

title: Estonian Independence Restored
description: Estonia re-established independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Latvian Independence Restored
description: Latvia re-established independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Ukrainian Independence
description: Ukraine declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Belarusian Independence
description: Belarus declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Moldovan Independence
description: Moldova declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Kyrgyz Independence
description: Kyrgyzstan declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Uzbek Independence
description: Uzbekistan declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Macedonian Independence
description: North Macedonia declared independence from Yugoslavia.

title: Tajik Independence
description: Tajikistan declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Azerbaijani Independence
description: Azerbaijan declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Turkmen Independence
description: Turkmenistan declared independence from the Soviet Union.

title: Kazakh Independence
description: Kazakhstan declared independence from the Soviet Union, the last republic to do so.

title: Dissolution of the Soviet Union
description: The Soviet Union officially dissolved, ending the Cold War era and creating 15 independent nations.

title: Bosnian Independence
description: Bosnia and Herzegovina declared independence from Yugoslavia.

title: Czech Republic Founded
description: Czechoslovakia peacefully dissolved into the Czech Republic and Slovakia.

title: Slovakia Founded
description: Slovakia became an independent state following the peaceful dissolution of Czechoslovakia.

title: Eritrean Independence
description: Eritrea gained independence from Ethiopia following a 30-year war.

title: European Union Established
description: The Maastricht Treaty came into force, transforming the European Community into the European Union.

title: End of Apartheid in South Africa
description: South Africa held its first multiracial elections, marking the end of apartheid.

title: Hong Kong Handover
description: Hong Kong was transferred from British to Chinese sovereignty under 'one country, two systems'.

title: Macau Handover
description: Macau was transferred from Portuguese to Chinese sovereignty.

title: East Timorese Independence
description: East Timor gained independence from Indonesia, becoming the first new sovereign state of the 21st century.

title: Montenegrin Independence
description: Montenegro declared independence from the State Union of Serbia and Montenegro.

title: Kosovar Declaration of Independence
description: Kosovo declared independence from Serbia, recognized by over 100 UN member states.

title: South Sudanese Independence
description: South Sudan gained independence from Sudan, becoming the world's newest country.

title: North Macedonia Name Change
description: The Republic of Macedonia officially changed its name to the Republic of North Macedonia under the Prespa Agreement.

title: Great Union of Romania
description: Transylvania, Bessarabia, and Bukovina united with Romania, forming Greater Romania.

title: Italian Republic Founded
description: Italy held a referendum and abolished the monarchy, establishing the Italian Republic.

title: Treaty of Paris — Italian Borders
description: Italy ceded Istria, Fiume, and Zara to Yugoslavia and the Dodecanese to Greece.

title: Armenian Independence
description: Armenia declared independence from the Soviet Union following a nationwide referendum.

title: Togolese Independence
description: Togo gained independence from French-administered United Nations trusteeship.

title: Malagasy Independence
description: Madagascar gained independence from France.

title: Chadian Independence
description: Chad gained independence from France.

title: Republic of the Congo Independence
description: The Republic of the Congo gained independence from France.

title: Malian Independence
description: Mali gained independence from France.

title: Senegalese Independence
description: Senegal gained independence from France.

title: Kuwaiti Independence
description: Kuwait gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Trinidadian Independence
description: Trinidad and Tobago gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Bahraini Independence
description: Bahrain gained independence from the United Kingdom.

title: Qatari Independence
description: Qatar gained independence from the United Kingdom.
